name: Flutter Dev Container
postCreateCommand: sudo mkdir -p /usr/lib/llvm-18/bin && sudo ln -sf /usr/bin/ar /usr/lib/llvm-18/bin/ar && if [ -e /usr/bin/ld.lld ]; then sudo ln -sf /usr/bin/ld.lld /usr/lib/llvm-18/bin/ld.lld; fi && sudo ln -sf /usr/bin/ld /usr/lib/llvm-18/bin/ld && /bin/sh -c 'flutter pub get'
